content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.collective.tool_awareness
FILE: cosmos/core/collective/tool_awareness.py (382 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Collective Tool Awareness
====================================

Let agents know about available tools and collectively decide on tool usage.

Tools available to the collective:
- generate_image: Create Borg Cosmos meme images (Gemini with references)
- generate_video: Animate images to 5-15 s

CLASSES:
- ToolDefinition: Definition of an available tool.
- ToolDecision: A collective decision about tool usage.
- CollectiveToolAwareness: Let agents know about and decide on tool usage.

Injects tool context into agent
  Methods: def get_tool_context_for_agents(self) -> str
  Methods: async def analyze_deliberation_for_tools(self, result: DeliberationResult) -> ToolDecision
  Methods: def format_tool_calling_prompt(self, task_description: str='') -> str
  Methods: def should_include_media_quick(self, response_text: str, turn_count: int=1) -> bool

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_tool_awareness() -> CollectiveToolAwareness
